# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export default function main(request, event) {
  return new Response(event.data);
}
// Replace this with your code

export async function streamingData(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
   return await new Response("Test");
};


export async function data(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
    const data = "Hello world";

    // Readable stream from a string
    const stream = new ReadableStream({
        start(controller) {
            controller.enqueue(data);

            // The 'done' is the third argument and its value will depend on the request.
            controller.close();
        }
    });

    return new Response(stream, { headers: {"Content-Type": "text/plain"} });
}
